>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/programData/checkNewerVersions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Check if newer versions are available for a list of program IDs and versions

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"programId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"versionId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"ProgramIdAndVersionId"}}}},"description":"The list of program IDs and versions to check for newer versions","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"boolean"}}},"description":"Returns true if there are newer versions, false otherwise"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"User does not have rights to access this program"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while checking for newer versions"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
